task_updates.executor_notes: Ported the shared resolver utility layer into `supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/shared/` and updated the create-task project ownership query to also fetch `aspect_ratio`. Verification: repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed; attempted `deno check` could not run because `deno` is unavailable here.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: All seven shared utilities were ported with local `.ts` imports and no browser/Node-only APIs; repository `tsc` passed, and a grep scan found no `window`, `document`, `process`, `navigator`, `localStorage`, `sessionStorage`, `require`, or `import.meta.env` usage in the new edge utility files. `deno check` could not be run because `deno` is unavailable in this workspace. The `resolution.ts` aspect-ratio map matches the client-side `ASPECT_RATIO_TO_RESOLUTION` entries exactly, and the image-generation scaling logic preserves the 1.5x default scaling for `qwen-image`, `qwen-image-2512`, and `z-image`.
